title: How to Split a Large SQL File on Windows
description: Windows tools are limited for huge dumps. Here are the safest ways to split without breaking SQL.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: Notepad won’t open a 2GB dump, and naive split tools break multi‑line INSERTs. Here’s a safe approach.
Upload nothing—process locally. SQLSplit keeps statements intact and outputs clean chunks.
Related: **How to Split a mysqldump File Into Smaller Parts**.

content.title: Split safely on Windows
content.text: Use a splitter that respects SQL structure.

faq.question: Can I just use a file splitter?
faq.answer: No. It can cut SQL statements and corrupt your import.

faq.question: Does SQLSplit work offline?
faq.answer: Yes. It runs in your browser with no upload.
